SEED & SAGE

Shape a world, then seed its voice.

World
Buildupwild ↔ city
Greenerybare ↔ lush
Fertilitybarren ↔ rich
Animalsfew ↔ teeming
Monsterscalm ↔ dangerous
Treasurescarce ↔ rich
Palette
Huecolour of the world
Saturationmuted ↔ vivid

the ages turn…
